items.title: Reframing Superintelligence: Comprehensive AI Services as General Intelligence
items.reason_ja: 既にアーカイブ済み。CAIS概念はconcepts/cais, concepts/comprehensive-ai-services, entities/k-eric-drexlerで詳細カバー済み。
items.body_excerpt: K. Eric Drexler's 210-page FHI tech report framing superintelligence as distributed CAIS rather than monolithic agents.

items.title: MAI-Thinking-1: Building a Hill-Climbing Machine — Technical Report
items.reason_ja: 既存Wikiで完全カバー済み。concepts/mai-thinking-1-tech-report (227行) にてアーキテクチャ(LatentMoE, interleaved dense/MoE, GQA, FlashAttention-4)、訓練(30T pre-train + 3.55T mid-training, no synthetic data, no distillation)、RL climb (modified GRPO, 3 domain-specialist models)、ベンチマーク(SWE-Bench Pro 52.8%, AIME 2025 97.0%, LiveCodeBench v6 87.7%)、hill-climbing framework、scaling ladder(L12-L42)を詳細記述。raw articleはsourcesに登録済み。
items.body_excerpt: MAI-Thinking-1: 35B active/1T total MoE reasoning model. 30T tokens pre-training from scratch, no distillation. Modified GRPO with adaptive entropy control, 256K context. 52.8% SWE-Bench Pro, 97.0% AIME 2025, 87.7% LiveCodeBench v6.

items.title: Awesome Agent Evals — curated list (443+ resources)
items.reason_ja: 既存Wikiで完全カバー済み。concepts/ai-benchmarks/benchflow-tool (118行) にてフレームワーク・Awesome Agent Evals一覧・12のMust-Read(Shunyu Yao, Eugene Yan, Hamel Husain等)・コンパイル方法論(depth-4 citation crawl 11.6k papers, 47 talks transcribed)・企業ランドスケープが詳細に記述済み。raw articleはsourcesに登録済み。
items.body_excerpt: 443+ curated links for building and evaluating AI agents. 12 must-read starter set. Depth-4 citation crawl (11.6K papers), 47 talks transcribed. Sections: why evals, model/harness/skill decomposition, eval infrastructure, LLM-as-judge, agent-specific evaluation, safety/adversarial, companies landscape.
